title: Block Domain - Cisco Stealthwatch
content:
This playbook blocks domains using Cisco Stealthwatch Cloud.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (CiscoStealthwatch, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — Domain: The Domain to block..

Integrations/scripts used: Stealthwatch Cloud.
